summary: Revised implementation — addressed medium + 2 low review issues. R6 [defaults.workspace] fallback now wired (load_projects applies defaults.workspace.codegen to workspaces with no codegen; write_projects_toml preserves existing defaults table across round-trip). T11 merge_both_with_override strengthened with explicit per-field absence assertion. sync::run replaced process::exit(1) with anyhow::bail so error propagates through run_command -> main. 4 new tests added; all 20 project tests pass; cargo build -p sdd -p score-cli succeeds.
